prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `bd283c4a`.
codex_response:
Implemented the new ARC2 task package for `bd283c4a` in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_bd283c4a/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_bd283c4a/verifier.py), [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_bd283c4a/generator.py), [helpers.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_bd283c4a/helpers.py), and [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_bd283c4a/notes.md). The rule is: count each color, sort colors by descending frequency, then repack the whole grid into vertical bands left-to-right while filling each column bottom-up. I discarded the summary hint because it got the within-column direction wrong.

The generator matches the task family by sampling four nonzero colors, choosing strict descending counts in the same rough regime as the official examples, shuffling those cells into a noisy 10x10 input, and deriving the output from the latent histogram packing. No new primitive was needed in `arc2/dsl_ext.py`.

Verification succeeded: official examples `3/3`, generated examples `1000/1000`. Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/bd283c4a/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/bd283c4a/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/bd283c4a/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/bd283c4a/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/bd283c4a/previews/preview_03.png).
